source_of_truth: docs/feature/client-driven-onboarding/distill/roadmap.json (CDO-S3 entry) + ADR-049 (§3/§4 crash-class + machine realignment) + ADR-050 (§c failure causes, §e closed wire vocabulary + state-document deltas) + domain-model.md (§4-§6, Specs 4-8, §6 Option 1 ratified)
paradigm: object-oriented (XState v5 statecharts + Hono router; TypeScript strict; Prettier)
scope_boundary: shared/ui-state-wire/ + ui-state/ ONLY. NON-GOALS: auth-proxy (CDO-S4: mode discovery/reissue/retry-KPI), ui/ surfaces + auth-proxy WorkOS interception + compose env deltas + session-chat egress retirement/report vocabulary (CDO-S5). The execution-log.json lives at the deliver root (shared with CDO-S1/S2); CDO-S3 appends step ids 03-01..03-04.
binding_amendments: Outcome/failure event names are PLAIN PAST TENSE (DR-2 override). org_create_failed/project_create_failed are BOTH an event `type` AND (for the generic retry class) a `payload.cause` value — they live in different fields and never collide structurally.

Cause tags (org_name_taken | org_name_invalid | org_create_failed; project_create_failed; ScopeMismatchCause) are MACHINE-READABLE WIRE VALUES ONLY — the wire/types must carry the enums; raw rendering is CDO-S5's concern and out of scope here.
KPI literal compatibility: the region state names `error_recoverable` and `ready` are load-bearing for auth-proxy's KPI sniffer — KEEP them by name (do not rename).

Single-cut closed union (ADR-050 §e cost, user-ratified 'by user ruling'): removing the `{type:string}` catch-all, narrowing `ChatAppPhase` (loses 'rejected'), and pruning `ReducedContext` (4 fields) narrows the SHARED types that out-of-scope `frontend/` (parked legacy SPA) and `ui/` (CDO-S5's slice) import. The legacy NAMED members org_form_submitted/create_project_submitted/switching_project_intent STAY in the union this slice (ui/onboarding.tsx + frontend tests construct them; their retirement is CDO-S5's ui/ single-cut). Their dead handlers being gone from the machines is fine (known-but-unhandled → convergence). The FE/ui tsc breakage from the type-narrowing is the documented single-cut consequence, completed in CDO-S5; the refinery --auto (backend pytest) gate is unaffected and ui-state's own vitest+tsc + shared tsc MUST stay green.
gate_command: cd ui-state && npx vitest run && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../shared/ui-state-wire && npx tsc --noEmit
acceptance_command: cd tests/acceptance/org-onboarding && uv run --no-project pytest -m cdo_s3
acceptance_outer_loop: tests/acceptance/org-onboarding/ (cdo_s3 marker) is the RED outer loop, run by the orchestrator at the post-merge integration gate (NOT per-step — the closed-union single cut is intentionally incoherent at the wire between 03-03 and 03-04). Driving tests: test_org_name_taken_reedit.py, test_invalid_org_name_stays_needs_org.py (org_name_invalid re-edit arm; the 422 half landed in CDO-S2), test_org_create_failure_retryable.py, test_default_project_retry_convergence.py, test_late_event_converges_process_alive.py (Spec 8 — convergence + LIVENESS), test_unknown_event_type_rejected.py. The DETERMINISTIC crash-vector reproduction (send into a settled/stopped child; unknown-type 400) is a ui-state UNIT test (DWD-5) driven in step 03-04 — do not lose it.
stack_note: No compose stack running; host ports free. Bring up THIS worktree's stack (compose project defaults to 'lifeguard'): docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev-no-org.yml up -d api auth-proxy ui-state redis (+deps). REBUILD the ui-state image after each ui-state code change before the acceptance run: ... up -d --build ui-state. Suite env (README + conftest): AUTH_MODE=dev + DEV_NO_ORG=true; auth-proxy ingress on :1042; REVERSE_PROXY routes /api + /ui-state. Done → docker compose down (leave images).
must_not_regress: CDO-S1 walking skeleton + the 5 cdo_s1 acceptance checkpoints (HTTP).
CDO-S2 backend gate (no backend files touched this slice).
The full ui-state vitest suite (currently 177 tests / 17 files) — net changes track retired/added contracts 1:1; NO .skip/.only/xit; Iron Rule on surviving assertions.

The session-chat machine: its egress retires in CDO-S5, NOT here. Phase-gated routing MUST still deliver session-chat vocabulary in the chat phase exactly as today (the surviving UI intents enumerated in the closed union).

phases.name: CDO-S3 failure-class robustness + crash-class elimination + closed-union closure

steps.name: Onboarding failure arms: re-edit vs retry split + report-accepting error_recoverable
steps.criteria: The onboarding machine gains the org_create_failed report and splits re-edit vs retry (ADR-049 §3 / domain §4.2-4.3, Specs 4+5). needs_org on org_create_failed: cause=org_name_taken → REMAIN needs_org + set org_validation_error {kind:'duplicate'} (recordOrgNameTaken); cause=org_name_invalid → REMAIN needs_org + set org_validation_error from the shape rule (recordOrgValidationError reading event.org_name); cause=org_create_failed (else) → error_recoverable + tagCause. error_recoverable becomes REPORT-ACCEPTING: on org_created → ready (assignCreatedOrg), on org_found → ready (assignResolvedOrg), on org_create_failed → error_recoverable (tagCause refresh). The partial-setup terminal dead-end dies. UnderlyingCauseTag DROPS 'partial-setup' and carries the generic retry cause 'org_create_failed' (the §c retry tag); keep 'transient'/'cookie-blocked'/'workos-profile-corrupt' (used by __force_failure__).
files_to_modify: ui-state/lib/machines/onboarding/setup/domain.ts — add `export type OrgCreateFailureCause = 'org_name_taken' | 'org_name_invalid' | 'org_create_failed'` (the §c onboarding cause enum); UnderlyingCauseTag drops 'partial-setup' and adds 'org_create_failed'; update isUnderlyingCauseTag to match (drop partial-setup, add org_create_failed). GREP first for any 'partial-setup' producer/consumer (router causeTag refine, __force_failure__ tests) and reconcile.

ui-state/lib/machines/onboarding/setup/types.ts — OnboardingEvent gains `| { type: 'org_create_failed'; cause: OrgCreateFailureCause; org_name?: string }` (top-level fields — the transport spreads payload; matches org_found/org_created shape).

ui-state/lib/machines/onboarding/setup/actions.ts — confirm/wire recordOrgNameTaken ({kind:'duplicate'}) + recordOrgValidationError (constructOrgName(event.org_name).getError() → org_validation_error) + tagCause(cause from event). They exist dormant from S1 (Explore-confirmed); make them read the org_create_failed event fields.

ui-state/lib/machines/onboarding/setup/guards.ts — add cause-discriminating guards (causeIsOrgNameTaken / causeIsOrgNameInvalid reading event.cause) for the needs_org split; the guards bundle was emptied in S1.

ui-state/lib/machines/onboarding/machine.ts — needs_org.on.org_create_failed = [ {guard:causeIsOrgNameTaken, actions:recordOrgNameTaken}, {guard:causeIsOrgNameInvalid, actions:recordOrgValidationError}, {target:'error_recoverable', actions:tagCause} ] (the first two are internal/self — no target, stay needs_org). error_recoverable.on = { org_created→ready (assignCreatedOrg), org_found→ready (assignResolvedOrg), org_create_failed→error_recoverable (tagCause) }. Keep the needs_org __force_failure__ arm.

ui-state/lib/machines/onboarding/machine.test.ts — RED_UNIT driving cases: Spec 4 (org_name_taken stays needs_org + org_validation_error set, then org_created→ready), org_name_invalid arm (stays needs_org + org_validation_error), Spec 5 (org_create_failed→error_recoverable, then org_created→ready; and org_found→ready from error_recoverable).
steps.implementation_notes: Pure onboarding machine + setup — drive directly against the onboarding actor (no parent/router yet). Greens in isolation; the acceptance #1-3 stay RED until 03-04 opens the router ACL to org_create_failed. The S1 wave-notes flagged 'CDO-S3 reintroduces submit + validation' — that reintroduction is the org_create_failed report path here (NOT a re-added org_form_submitted; that retires with the client-driven model). Do NOT re-add isOrgNameValid as a submit guard — the SSOT validation is the backend 422 (S2); here the machine only records the reported re-edit signal.

steps.name: Project-context failure arm: project_create_failed + report-accepting error_recoverable (probe-first convergence target)
steps.scenario_name: Spec 7b (project_create_failed → error_recoverable → scope_resolved convergence, no duplicate)
steps.criteria: The project-context machine makes project failures recoverable (domain §5.1/§5.3, Spec 7b). awaiting_scope_report.on.project_create_failed → error_recoverable (tagCause); no_projects.on.project_create_failed → error_recoverable (tagCause). error_recoverable becomes REPORT-ACCEPTING (replacing the retry_clicked re-invoke): on project_created → project_selected (assignCreatedProject), on scope_resolved → project_selected (assignResolvedScope), on project_create_failed → error_recoverable (tagCause refresh). RETIRE the retry_clicked transition (ADR-049 §3.3 — retry = the client re-POSTs + re-reports). ProjectContextCauseTag gains 'project_create_failed'; add `export type ProjectCreateFailureCause = 'project_create_failed'`. The switch + scope_mismatch + deep-link discrimination are NOT touched here (they land atomically with the parent phase-gating in 03-04).
files_to_modify: ui-state/lib/machines/project-context/setup/types.ts — ProjectContextEvent gains `| { type: 'project_create_failed'; cause: ProjectCreateFailureCause }`; drop the `retry_clicked` member (retired); add `export type ProjectCreateFailureCause = 'project_create_failed'`; ProjectContextCauseTag adds 'project_create_failed'.

ui-state/lib/machines/project-context/machine.ts — add project_create_failed → error_recoverable on awaiting_scope_report + no_projects; rewrite error_recoverable.on to accept project_created/scope_resolved → project_selected and project_create_failed → error_recoverable; remove the retry_clicked arm. Leave switching_project / switchProject / scope_mismatch_terminal UNTOUCHED (03-04 reworks them).

ui-state/lib/machines/project-context/setup/actions.ts — confirm assignCreatedProject/assignResolvedScope/tagCause cover the new sources; drop clearErrorAndBumpRetries ONLY if it becomes unreferenced (else leave for 03-04).

ui-state/lib/machines/project-context/machine.test.ts — RED_UNIT: project_create_failed from awaiting_scope_report AND from no_projects → error_recoverable; from error_recoverable a scope_resolved → project_selected (Spec 7b convergence) and a project_created → project_selected; assert the retired retry_clicked no longer transitions.
steps.implementation_notes: Pure project-context machine + setup; drive against the project-context actor directly. The switchProject invoke + isAccessRevoked/isSwitchProjectNotFound guards stay live this step (03-04 retires them with the report-only switch), so the existing US-207 switch unit tests stay GREEN here. Greens in isolation; acceptance #4 (probe-first convergence) goes green at the post-merge gate after 03-04 opens the router.

steps.name: Closed wire union + state-document deltas + ui-state projection reconciliation
steps.scenario_name: ADR-050 §e closed vocabulary + state-document deltas; ChatAppPhase loses 'rejected'; ReducedContext prune (AR-7)
steps.criteria: shared/ui-state-wire becomes the closed wire SSOT and the state-document narrows. wire-event.ts: REMOVE the trailing `{ type: string; payload? }` catch-all; ADD `org_create_failed {cause: OrgCreateFailureCause; org_name?}`, `project_create_failed {cause: ProjectCreateFailureCause}`, `scope_mismatch {cause: ScopeMismatchCause}`, `project_switched {project: ProjectSnapshot}` with the cause enums; ADD the surviving session-chat UI intents so the closed ACL can name them (session_clicked{session_id}, new_session_clicked, first_message_sent{content}, refresh_session_list, dataset_resolved_by_agent{resource_id,resource_type}, dataset_picked_directly{resource_id,resource_type}, suggestion_chip_clicked_upload, suggestion_chip_clicked_browse_projects). KEEP org_form_submitted/create_project_submitted/switching_project_intent/open_deep_link/session_begin/__force_failure__ (FE/ui compat — retired in CDO-S5). state-document.ts: ChatAppPhase loses 'rejected'; ReducedContext prunes access_token, pending_project_name, most_recent_session_per_project, last_used_resolution_degraded (AR-7); initialReducedContext + anonymousStateDocument follow. ui-state projection reconciles: derivePhase drops the user_rejected→'rejected' branch; ChatAppPhase (derive-state-document.ts) loses 'rejected'; any ReducedContext writer of the pruned fields removed.
files_to_modify: shared/ui-state-wire/wire-event.ts — closed union per criteria; add OrgCreateFailureCause/ProjectCreateFailureCause/ScopeMismatchCause type aliases (or import-mirror) so the members are typed; remove the catch-all. Confirm the cause enums match ui-state's onboarding/project-context enums (single spelling).

shared/ui-state-wire/state-document.ts — ChatAppPhase = 'onboarding'|'project_context'|'chat' (drop 'rejected'); delete the 4 pruned ReducedContext fields + their initialReducedContext entries; anonymousStateDocument unaffected by the prune (it uses initialReducedContext).

ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/projection/derive-state-document.ts — ChatAppPhase loses 'rejected'; derivePhase deletes `if (value === 'user_rejected') return 'rejected'` (the parent's user_rejected state is removed in 03-04; the branch is already unreachable post-S1, so deleting now is safe); ensure no RegionView.context build writes a pruned field.
ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/router.ts — canonicalChildForPhase: drop the dead 'rejected' comment/case (no behaviour change).

ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/projection/derive-state-document.test.ts + .contract.test.ts — SANCTIONED rework: drop the 'rejected'/session_rejected phase assertions; drop pruned-field assertions. Reconcile the S1-carried needs_org contract arm if affected.
shared/ui-state-wire/*.test.ts (if present) — reconcile any anonymousStateDocument/ReducedContext shape assertions.
steps.implementation_notes: Type-level SSOT narrowing + projection reconciliation. The ui-state vitest + ui-state tsc + shared tsc MUST stay green. EXPECTED out-of-scope tsc breakage (single-cut, documented in binding_amendments): ui/app/routes/app-shell.tsx (`phase === 'rejected'`) and frontend/app/routes/projects.tsx (reads pruned fields) — DO NOT fix them (CDO-S5 owns ui/; frontend/ is parked). GREP-VERIFY before pruning that no IN-SCOPE (ui-state, shared) live reader depends on the 4 pruned fields beyond the test reconciliation. The acceptance suite is unaffected by this step alone (router unchanged); its greenness is gated on 03-04.

steps.name: Crash-class elimination: phase-gated vocabulary routing + closed router ACL + report-only switch
steps.scenario_name: Spec 8 (late/out-of-phase known event → no transition, current document, process ALIVE) + closed-union unknown→400 (the deterministic DWD-5 crash reproduction)
steps.criteria: The settled-child crash class becomes UNREPRESENTABLE (ADR-049 §4 / domain §6 Option 1). PARENT (chat-app/machine.ts): DELETE active_child_id (+ markLoginActive/markProjectContextActive/markChatActive), the root `on: { user_intent, child_event }` total forward, the user_rejected state + its isUserRejected onSnapshot arm + captureUserRejected. ADD phase-gated vocabulary handlers that sendTo the FIXED child alive in that state: login.on = onboarding vocab (org_found/org_not_found/org_created/org_create_failed/__force_failure__) → forwardToOnboarding; engaged.on = project-context vocab (scope_resolved/no_projects_found/project_created/project_create_failed/scope_mismatch/project_switched/open_deep_link/back_to_projects_clicked) → forwardToProjectContext (on `engaged`, NOT engaged.project_context, so switch reports reach project-context from chat — domain §6); engaged.chat.on = session vocab (session_clicked/new_session_clicked/first_message_sent/refresh_session_list/dataset_resolved_by_agent/dataset_picked_directly/suggestion_chip_*) → forwardToSessionChat. An out-of-phase KNOWN event has no handler → XState drops it → no sendTo → convergence. ROUTER (chat-app/router.ts): a FULL closed-vocabulary Zod schema typed `z.ZodType<ChatAppWireEvent>` validates EVERY POST (unknown type → 400 in every phase); replace forwardToActor's child_event-wrapping + switching_project_intent→PROJECT_SWITCH special case with a raw forward `actor.send({ type, ...payload })`; keep the failure-sim gate + session_begin cold-start. PROJECT-CONTEXT report-only switch (atomic with the parent routing): retire the switching_project state + switchProject invoke + isAccessRevoked/isSwitchProjectNotFound guards + captureSwitchTarget + assignSwitchedProject; project_selected.on.scope_mismatch → scope_mismatch_terminal (tagCause from event.cause), project_selected.on.project_switched → project_selected (assignResolvedScope-style), awaiting_scope_report.on.scope_mismatch → scope_mismatch_terminal; drop the switching_project_intent handler. Spec 8 LIVENESS holds (a subsequent request returns 200).
files_to_modify: ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/setup/types.ts — ChatAppContext drops active_child_id; ChatAppLifecycle drops 'user_rejected'; OnboardingResult.state drops 'session_rejected' (only 'ready' remains); ChatAppEvent union replaces the user_intent/PROJECT_SWITCH/child_event triple with the spread vocabulary members it now handles directly (onboarding outcomes + project-context outcomes + session UI intents, each `{type, ...fields}` matching the child event shapes). Keep ChatUserIntent only if still referenced.

ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/setup/actions.ts — DELETE forwardChildEventToActiveChild, forwardIntentToActiveChild, captureUserRejected, forwardSwitchToProjectContext; ADD forwardToOnboarding/forwardToProjectContext/forwardToSessionChat = ({event,enqueue}) => enqueue.sendTo('<child>', event) (the event already carries the spread fields). captureAuthHandoff/captureProjectHandoff/forwardAuthReady/forwardProjectReady unchanged.
ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/setup/guards.ts — DELETE isUserRejected; keep isUserReady/isInitialProjectSelected/shouldSwitchProject.

ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/machine.ts — remove the mark*Active assigns + active_child_id seed + root on{} + user_rejected state + the isUserRejected onSnapshot arm + the engaged PROJECT_SWITCH handler; add the phase-gated on-handlers per criteria. Keep the onboarding/project-context/session-chat invokes + onSnapshot hand-offs verbatim.

ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/router.ts — define the closed chatAppWireEventSchema: z.ZodType<ChatAppWireEvent> (importing ChatAppWireEvent from @dashboard-chat/ui-state-wire); validate every POST (after the session_begin/cold-start branch), unknown→400; rewrite forwardToActor → raw `actor.send({ type, ...payload })`; drop the onboarding-phase-only dispatch + the switching_project_intent special case; keep the __force_failure__ gate + bookkeeping.

ui-state/lib/machines/project-context/machine.ts — retire switching_project state + switchProject invoke; project_selected.on { scope_mismatch→scope_mismatch_terminal (tagCause), project_switched→project_selected (assignResolvedScope) }; awaiting_scope_report.on.scope_mismatch→scope_mismatch_terminal; remove switching_project_intent.

ui-state/lib/machines/project-context/setup/types.ts — ProjectContextEvent: drop switching_project_intent; add `| { type: 'scope_mismatch'; cause: ScopeMismatchCause }` and `| { type: 'project_switched'; project: ProjectSummary }`; add `export type ScopeMismatchCause = 'cross_tenant' | 'project_not_found' | 'access_revoked'`.

ui-state/lib/machines/project-context/setup/{actions.ts,guards.ts} — drop captureSwitchTarget/assignSwitchedProject + isAccessRevoked/isSwitchProjectNotFound if unreferenced after the invoke retires; tagCause reads event.cause for scope_mismatch.
ui-state/lib/machines/project-context/setup/actors.ts — drop switchProject from buildActors (no remaining invoke); reconcile ProjectContextMachineDeps.

ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/machine.test.ts — RED_UNIT: the DETERMINISTIC crash reproduction (DWD-5) — drive the parent to engaged/chat, send an onboarding-vocabulary event (or any event whose old active_child_id target is the stopped onboarding child), assert NO throw + no transition + the snapshot is the current settled state (convergence), and a subsequent event still processes (liveness). Replace the deleted active_child_id/child_event/user_intent/user_rejected tests with phase-gated routing tests.

ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/state-router.integration.test.ts — SANCTIONED rework: POST the raw closed-vocabulary events (not child_event envelopes); add the router unknown-type→400 case (DWD-5 edge); assert the happy cascade + late-event convergence + liveness through the HTTP surface.

ui-state/lib/machines/chat-app/integration.test.ts + snapshot.test.ts — rework child_event-driven ARRANGE to the raw phase-gated events; rework the switch path to project_switched; keep the (f)-triple + cascade assertions.
steps.implementation_notes: The big single-cut step (parent + router + project-context switch land atomically so the switch-from-chat path is never broken between steps). Target 45 turns; COMMIT progress if approaching the cap. Each forwarder sendTo target is a literal invoke id ('onboarding'/'project-context'/'session-chat') alive by construction in that phase-state — that is the whole point of phase-gating (no mutable active_child_id pointer to go stale). VERIFY: full ui-state vitest GREEN; ui-state tsc + shared tsc clean; the session-chat machine untouched and its chat-phase delivery intact (session UI intents still reach it). The DWD-5 unit test must FAIL on the pre-step parent (the total-forward into the stopped child) and PASS after phase-gating — that is the regression lock for the 2026-06-10 process death.

validation.approver: orchestrator (nw-deliver) — grounded in ADR-049/050 + domain-model §4-6 + the 6 cdo_s3 acceptance tests + a full read of the live ui-state machine/router/projection/setup tree and the FE/ui consumer surface
validation.notes: 4 sequential steps, each ending green in the ui-state vitest+tsc unit gate. Acceptance (cdo_s3) is the outer RED loop verified at the post-merge integration gate after 03-04. DISTILL linkage: every cdo_s3 driving test maps to a step (onboarding Specs 4/5 → 03-01; project Spec 7b → 03-02 [+router 03-04]; closed union/state-doc → 03-03; Spec 8 convergence+liveness + unknown→400 + DWD-5 → 03-04). Step-id format NN-NN. No new top-level components (Reuse gate: EXTEND/REALIGN/RETIRE only — domain §7).
